name: Auden AG
summary: Auden AG is a venture capital firm specializing in growth capital and startup investments. It considers majority and minority stake in its portfolio companies and invests only in companies based in Germany. The company was formerly known as Kilian Kerner AG and changed its name to Auden AG in May 2016. Auden AG was founded in 2010 and is based in Frankfurt am Main, Germany with an additional office in Berlin, Germany.
